title: Ordnance
description: If only you could throw more....
body:
### This mod adds several new weapons of (not so) mass destruction!

Those weapons include, as of 1.0.4
Angel Rods, a Throwable weapon which does tons of damage and sets stuff on fire, created with Netherite Scrap.
Throwable Fireballs.

## **↓ Installation Guide ↓**
Ordnance can be used for either [Quilt](https://quiltmc.org/en/) or [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/), Although i reccomend you use Quilt, as the mod is mostly made for that.
If you are using a third-party launcher (such as Modrinth Launcher or Prism Launcher), it has built-in functionality to automatically install mod loaders. Once you have installed your mod loader, you can simply put Ordnance into your mods folder like anything else.

### **Hey, The mod isnt showing up! Hey, i found a bug!**
If you find a bug, you are able to contact me using Gmail, My email being hexcodemagenta@gmail.com
